name: Legacy of Sin: Blood Oath
short_description: Legacy Of Sin: Blood Oath combines defense games with role-playing games, wrapped in the distinct style of 90s animated series! Hold your own against an onslaught of orcs, using an army of upgradeable, distinct warriors with their own unique abilities. Defend, control, win!
detailed_description:
The orcs are approaching and it's up to you and your army to defend the defenseless kingdom! Pick your soldiers from an array of distinct, upgradeable classes, devise a strategy, then stop them in their trails!

Key features

  • Route defense combined with RPG mechanics, focusing on the valiant defense of the kingdom against the onslaught of the orcs!

  • Select your defenders from an array of distinct classes, each with its own strengths and weaknesses, from the mundane archer, through musketeers, to pikemen and gunners!

  • Upgrade your army with hard-earned experience, unlocking special abilities that can turn the tide of the battle in your favor - but be careful, the enemy can do that as well...

  • Deal with ever-more dangerous orcish attackers, each requiring a different approach. A berserker is fast and deadly, but the real danger might come from that slow, plodding shield-orc making his way in the background...

  • Enjoy a unique, hand-drawn animation style, inspired by classic 90s animated series!
